{"query":"Suno AI v4.5 release date maximum song length eight minutes Pro Premium features changelog","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1719,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://suno.com/blog/introducing-v4-5","title":"Introducing v4.5 · Suno","content":"This magic is now more accessible than ever with v4.5, our newest and most expressive model.
v4.5 levels up creativity with more dynamic music, greater variety and accuracy in genres, and richer vocals.
With v4.5, we're also releasing tools to help you better express yourself: mix and match features like Personas, Covers, and Extend, make your favorite Covers longer, and much more.
Vocals now have enhanced range and emotional depth.
Covers and Personas have received major enhancements.
Use Covers and Personas together to remix voice, style, and structure all at once.
You can now make songs up to 8 minutes long while maintaining quality and coherence throughout.
v4.5 features more balanced, fuller mixes, and reduces both audio degradation and shimmer effects."},{"url":"https://suno.com/release-notes","title":"Suno Release Notes · Suno","content":"Two new iOS updates for more streamlined creation.
Today we launched v5.5, our best and most personal model yet.
It powers three new features: Voices, Custom Models, and My Taste.
v5.5 Our newest model — richer arrangements, sharper vocals, and more dynamic sound across every genre.
With features like Remove FX, Warp Markers, Time Signature Support and Alternates, you can reach your vision faster, with fewer barriers and way more fun.
Introducing Hooks — a new way to bring your Suno songs to life through short-form music videos.
Pro and Premier users can now Crop Songs on Suno.
Currently Crop Songs and the new Edit Details workflows are desktop-only.
**Your first 200 covers are free!** Once the initial 200 covers are used, each new cover generation will cost 10 credits, similar to generating new songs.
Endless Exploration: Dive into an infinite scroll of new styles and sounds.
We are excited to release our Audio Input feature, where you can make a song from any sound!
- 4-minute max clip length."},{"url":"https://www.musicbusinessworldwide.com/suno-upgrades-ai-music-generator-with-enhanced-vocal-capabilities-extended-track-length/","title":"Suno upgrades AI music generator with enhanced vocal capabilities, extended track length - Music Business Worldwide","content":"AI music generator Suno, the $500 million company facing copyright lawsuits from GEMA and major record companies, has rolled out its version 4.5 update, introducing significant improvements.
The upgraded features include improvements to vocal quality and doubling maximum song length, Suno said in a recent blog post.
Users will be able to create mashups combining different styles like midwest emo with neosoul or EDM with folk.
The maximum song length has been increased to eight minutes from four minutes, potentially opening the platform up for longer-form content creation.
The update also brings expanded functionality to the platform’s Covers and Personas features, allowing users to “genre switch” existing songs, for instance turning a rock song into a house remix.
Free users remain limited to the previous v4.0 model with a cap of 20 total songs, plus 10 daily creations using the older v3.5 model.
Suno’s update arrives amid growing competition in AI music generation."},{"url":"https://jackrighteous.com/en-us/blogs/guides-using-suno-ai-music-creation/suno-ai-v4-5-video-review-stems-editing-upload","title":"Suno AI v4.5 Video Review: Stems, Edits & 8-Min Uploads – Jack Righteous","content":"If you want to see what Suno AI 4.5 can actually do, this detailed video walkthrough is 🔥."}]}

The upgraded features include improvements to vocal quality and doubling maximum song length, **Suno** said in a recent blog post. The **v4.5** update enhances the range and emotional depth of AI-generated vocals, allowing users to “create everything from delicate, intimate performances to powerful deliveries with vibrato,” said Suno. The update also brings expanded functionality to the platform’s Covers and Personas features, allowing users to “genre switch” existing songs, for instance turning a rock song into a house remix. However, the use of existing content, including copyrighted material, in training AI models has prompted several players in the music industry to criticize and even take legal action against AI companies like Suno.
